calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Gender Change and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.
Petitioner: Dayana Zuleyca Cauich present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed Change of Gender and Isssuance of New Birth Certificate were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the Petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the Petition should be granted.
The Court grants the Petition of Dayana Zuleyca Cauich for Gender Change from male to female and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Order for Gender Change and Issuance of New Birth Certificate signed by the Court.
